name: Topsy-Turvy Apple Cinnamon Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 can cinnamon sweet rolls, 11 oz. refrigerated
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a 9-inch square or round baking pan with waxed paper or parchment.
2. Combine 1 cup of the apple pie filling with pecans and brown sugar in the pan.
3. Spread the mixture evenly.
4. Arrange the cinnamon sweet rolls on top of the apple mixture.
5. Microwave on medium-high for about 8-10 minutes, rotating the pan occasionally until the rolls are light and springy to the touch.
6. Invert the pan onto a plate immediately and serve with the remaining filling, warmed and poured over.
